items.placeName: Nala Spa - chợ đêm Phú Quốc

facebook.caption: 5.0 stars. 73 reviews. Zero complaints. Nala Spa - chợ đêm Phú Quốc sits inside the night market at Kiot 40, 42 Đ. Lê Lợi, meaning you can eat, shop, and decompress all in one block. A perfect 5.0 rating on 73 reviews is rare anywhere. In a night market spa, it's almost unheard of. Add this to the itinerary. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

This is not a party boat. It is the reason people say Phu Quoc changed them.
